OPPOSITION DEFT'S MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TONG, MONA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VESCO, JOSEPH SMITH, CONNIE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 314 1/2 PRECITA AVENUE (REAR COTTAGE, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL AUG-31-1994, LEASE FORFEITED, PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFT JOSEPH VESCO $8,940.00 IN CONSIDERATION OF HIS MOVING OF THE PREMISES, $4,000 WITHIN 48 HOURS AND $4,940 BY AUGUST 7, 1994. SEE JUDGMENT FOR MORE DETAILS.
